    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    S

    saveGame(File) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Saves the current game state to a JSON file.
    saveGameState(GameStateData, File) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
    Saves the current game state to a JSON-File.
    saveMove() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Adds the current state of the game to the History (Memento).
    setBoard(Map<Integer, Node>, PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Sets up the board with a new configuration by deep copying the provided board and establishing the necessary connections between nodes.
    setDifficulty(DifficultyStrategy) - Methode in Klasse players.CPUPlayer
    Sets the difficulty level of the CPU player by assigning a new strategy.
    setMoveListener(Consumer<Node[]>) - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Sets a listener that will be notified when a complete move (from and to node) is selected.
    setNode(Node) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Stone
    Sets the node the stone is placed on.
    setPhase(GamePhase) - Methode in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Changes the current phase to a new one.
    setPlacedStones(int) - Methode in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Sets the number of placed stones for the player.
    setRemoveListener(Consumer<Node>) - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Sets a listener that will be notified when a complete move (remove) is selected.
    setRemoveMode(boolean) - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Changes the remove mode to a desired state.
    setTimeLeft(int) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.TurnTimer
    Sets the remaining time left to perform a move.
    setTimePerTurn(int) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Setter for the time a player has to perform a move before he loses the game.
    SettingPhase - Klasse in phases
    This class represents the setting phase of the game where players can place stones to unoccupied nodes.
    SettingPhase(PlayerEntity) - Konstruktor für Klasse phases.SettingPhase
    Sets the context.
    settingPhaseMoves() - Methode in Klasse players.ImaginativePlayer
    Helper method for the ImaginativePlayer.getAllPossibleMoves() method.
    setWinner(PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Setter for the player that has won the game.
    showGameOverMsg(PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse view.GUI
    Displays a dialog with the game over message, winner and loser information.
    signalPlayerMove(Node, Node) - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Signals that the player has selected a move.
    signalPlayerRemove(Point) - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    When a mill is formed the player chooses one stone over the gui
    SINGLEPLAYER_MODE - Statische Variable in Klasse view.DifficultyScreenPanel
     
    slider - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    STALEMATE - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse boardLogic.GameManager.LossCause
     
    startGame(String, DifficultyStrategy) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Gets called when the startbutton gets pressed and initializes the game in a separate thread.
    startTimer() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.TurnTimer
    Starts the timer.
    startTurnTimer() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Starts a new timer with the set time per turn.
    stone - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.Node
     
    Stone - Klasse in boardLogic
    Represents a stone in the game, which is owned by a player and placed on a node.
    Stone(PlayerEntity) - Konstruktor für Klasse boardLogic.Stone
    Creates a stone and sets its owner.
    STONE_RADIUS - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    STONECOUNT - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse boardLogic.GameManager.LossCause
     
    stonePlaced() - Methode in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Counts how many stones of the player have already been placed.
    stonePositions - Variable in Klasse persistance.PlayerData
     
    stones - Variable in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
     
    stopTimer() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.TurnTimer
    Stops the timer, causing it to stop executing events as well.
    stopTurnTimer() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Stops the timer, if it is initialized correctly.
    strategy - Variable in Klasse players.CPUPlayer
     
    styleBoardButton(JButton) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.StyleComponents
    Styles a button for the board by changing its colors, font, opacity and border.
    styleButton(JButton) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.StyleComponents
    Styles a button for general purposes by changing its colors, font, opacity and border.
    StyleComponents - Klasse in view
    This class is used to style different components in the GUI.
    StyleComponents() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.StyleComponents
     
    styleGameOverMsgButton(JButton) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.StyleComponents
    Styles a button for the game over message by changing its colors, font, opacity and border.
    switchPlayer() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Switches the current player to the opponent.
